desktop-information.description: Provide a name and description for your desktop to help identify it

desktop-kind.description: Select the kind of desktop you want to create

persistent.title: Persistent
persistent.description: A persistent desktop saves all changes and files permanently.

nonpersistent.title: Temporary
nonpersistent.description: A temporary desktop discards all changes and files when stopped. Only one temporary desktop is allowed per template.

access.description: This is a sumary of the access methods available for your desktop

hardware-limited.description: The following hardware values have been limited due to user permissions:

hardware-summary.description: This is a sumary of the template inherited hardware. It will be used for your desktop

all-hardware.description: The hardware can be edited through the following form

creating.title: Creating desktop
creating.description: Your desktop is being created, this might take a few moments

success.title: Desktop created successfully

notification.title: Important information when performing a migration:

description.delete_user: The previous user "{old_user_name}" ({old_user_provider} authentication) will be deleted.
description.disable_user: The previous user "{old_user_name}" ({old_user_provider} authentication) will be disabled.
description.user_description:
Any running desktops will be stopped. 
The user's recycle bin will be emptied. 
The user's bookings will be deleted. 
Non-persistent desktops will be DELETED 
Resources (such as networks, RAM, CPU, GPUS) not allowed for the new user will be removed or restricted.
description.description:
Any running desktops will be stopped. 
The user's recycle bin will be emptied. 
The user's bookings will be deleted. 
Non-persistent desktops will be DELETED 
The list of co-owners in deployments will be deleted. 
Desktops belonging to other users in migrated deployments will remain intact. 
Resources (such as networks, RAM, CPU, GPUS) not allowed for the new user will be removed or restricted. 
If the destiny user has any matching name, the migrated items will have '(migrated)' added to their name.

accept.title: I understand and accept the risks associated with the migration process
accept.required: You must check this box to continue

error.title: There were errors in the migration process:

success.title: Migration complete
success.description: Your items have been migrated to this account. You can now go to your desktops.

progress.title: Importing your data…
progress.description: Please keep this window open while your items are migrated.

recycle-bin.title: Recycle Bin
recycle-bin.table-title: List of deleted items pending to be restored or permanently deleted. Click an entry to see more details about the entry

alert.title: Attention
alert.empty-after: Items in the recycle bin are permanently deleted after remaining here for {time}.
alert.infinite: Items in the recycle bin are not automatically deleted.
alert.immediately: Items in the recycle bin will be permanently deleted immediately.

empty.title: Recycle bin is empty

empty.subtitle: Create a deployment to start providing desktops to your users

recreate-modal.description: Restores desktops to the initial state in which they were created. Only deleted desktops will be restored

delete-user.title: Delete user desktops
delete-user.description: This will delete all of this user's desktops in the deployment. This action cannot be undone.
delete-user.error: Could not delete the user's desktops

recreate.title: Recreate deployment
recreate.description: Restores desktops to the initial state in which they were created. Only deleted desktops will be restored.

stop-all.title: Stop all desktops
stop-all.description: This will stop every started desktop in the deployment. Users may lose unsaved work.
stop-all.error: Could not stop the deployment desktops

stop-user.title: Stop user desktops
stop-user.description: This will stop this user's started desktops. They may lose unsaved work.
stop-user.error: Could not stop the user's desktops

toggle-lab-visibility.description-visible: The users of the deployment will see and be able to use their desktops.
toggle-lab-visibility.description-invisible: The users of the deployment will no longer see their desktops. You can also stop the started ones.

toggle-user-visibility.description-visible: The user will see and be able to use their deployment desktops.
toggle-user-visibility.description-invisible: The user will no longer see their deployment desktops.

400.title: Bad Request
400.description: The request you sent is not valid. Please check the data and try again.

403.description: You don't have permission to access this resource.

404.title: Page Not Found
404.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been removed.

500.title: Internal Server Error
500.description: We're working to fix the problem. Please try again in a few minutes.

maintenance.title: Under maintenance
maintenance.description: The IsardVDI service will be available again in a few minutes. Sorry for the inconvenience.

restore-modal.title: Restore {name}
restore-modal.description: This item will become available again.

errors.generic: An error occurred while restoring the item. Please try again.
errors.unable_to_restore_user: Cannot restore. User "{user}" has been deleted.
errors.unable_to_restore_category: Cannot restore. The associated category has been deleted.
errors.unable_to_restore_group: Cannot restore. The associated group has been deleted.
errors.parent_template_not_found: Cannot restore. The parent template no longer exists.

empty-modal.title: Empty recycle bin
empty-modal.description: This will permanently delete all the entries in the recycle bin. This action is irreversible

ssh-key-modal.title: Bastion SSH key
ssh-key-modal.description: Add a single SSH public key to your profile. It is added automatically to the bastion SSH access of any desktop you start (when bastion SSH is enabled on that desktop), so you don't have to add it to each desktop.
ssh-key-modal.invalid: This doesn't look like a valid SSH public key.

alert.error-save: Could not save the SSH key. Please check the key and try again.
alert.error-remove: Could not remove the SSH key. Please try again.

alert.expired: Your old API key expired. You will need to generate a new one to continue using the IsardVDI API with external applications. You can generate a new one below.
alert.regenerated: Your old API key was deleted. Below you can copy the new one.
alert.error-fetch: Could not load your API key status. Please try again.
alert.error-generate: Could not generate the API key. Please try again.
alert.error-expire: Could not expire the API key. Please try again.
alert.valid-description: Your API key is valid until {date}. After that date, it will expire and you will not be able to use it anymore.

errors.unauthorized: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
errors.not_found: Your API key could not be found.
errors.internal_server: An internal server error occurred. Please try again later.

new-key.title: Generate a new API key
new-key.description: You can generate a new API key to use with external applications that integrate with the IsardVDI API.
new-key.warning: You will only be able to see the API key once, so make sure to store it in a safe place.

existing-key.description-1: Your API Key is valid until {date}. After that, it will expire and you will not be able to use it anymore.
existing-key.description-2: You can expire it now to generate a new one.
existing-key.description-expired: Your API key is expired. Click the button below to clear it and generate a new one.

reset-vpn-modal.title: Reset VPN keys
reset-vpn-modal.description: Reset VPN keys? You will have to download a new VPN file

errors.unauthorized: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
errors.internal_server: We couldn't reset your VPN keys due to a server error. Please try again later.
errors.generic: We couldn't reset your VPN keys. Please try again.

email-verification-modal.title: Change email
email-verification-modal.description: Enter your new email address. You'll receive a verification email to confirm the change.
email-verification-modal.error-generic: An error occurred while updating your email. Please try again.

errors.unauthorized: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
errors.not_found: The requested resource was not found.
errors.internal_server: An internal server error occurred. Please try again later.
errors.email_already_in_use: This email address is already in use

import-user-modal.title: Import user
import-user-modal.description: Import another user's items to this account
import-user-modal.instructions-title: How to get a migration token
import-user-modal.migration-instructions1: To start, you need a migration token from the account you wish to import.
import-user-modal.migration-instructions2: If you don't have one, you first have to log in to the account you want to migrate, click "Export User" on the profile page, and follow the instructions.
import-user-modal.migration-instructions3: Once you have the token, paste it in the field below.
import-user-modal.migrate-tooltip: Go to the migration page to continue the process

errors.title: Import error
errors.generic: There was an error importing the user. Please try again.
errors.token_expired: The token you provided has expired
errors.invalid_token: The token you provided is invalid
errors.no_items_to_migrate: There are no items to migrate
errors.multiple_migrations_found_target_user: There are multiple migrations for the new user
errors.same_user_migration: You can't migrate to the same account. When obtaining the token, you must log out and log in with the new account
errors.different_category_migration: You can't migrate to an account from a different category
errors.role_migration_admin: You can't migrate from an admin account
errors.role_migration_user: You can't migrate to a user account from an account with a higher role
errors.migration_desktop_quota_error: The user has more desktops than the new user quota
errors.migration_template_quota_error: The user has more templates than the new user quota
errors.migration_media_quota_error: The user has more media than the new user quota
errors.migration_deployments_quota_error: The user has more deployments than the new user quota

errors.password_character_length: Password must be at least {num} characters long
errors.password_uppercase: Password must have at least {num} uppercase character(s)
errors.password_lowercase: Password must have at least {num} lowercase character(s)
errors.password_digits: Password must have at least {num} number(s)
errors.password_special_characters: Password must have at least {num} special character(s): !{'@'}{'#'}$%^&*()-_=+[]{'{'}{'}'}{'|'};:'",.<>/?
errors.password_already_used: This password has already been used in the past
errors.password_username: Password can not contain your own username
errors.generic: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
errors.internal_server: An internal server error occurred. Please try again later.

quota-modal.title: Quota
quota-modal.description: You can check your resource usage here.

hide.title: Hide template '{name}'
hide.description: Hiding the template will make it invisible for other users to create desktops from it. Any temporary desktops created from this template will be deleted.

show.title: Make template '{name}' visible
show.description: Making the template visible will allow other users to create desktops from it.

delete-confirmation-modal.title: Delete template '{name}'
delete-confirmation-modal.subtitle: This action cannot be undone and all its associated data will be lost.

alert.title: Dependency warning
alert.description: The following desktops and templates depend on this template and will be deleted. This action cannot be undone and all its associated data will be lost.
alert.pending: There are some items that depend on this template that are not yours. Please contact an administrator to delete this template.

name.label: New Name
name.description: You can rename the template now to give the desktop a different name.

description.duplicated: This template is a duplicate of another template and cannot be converted to a desktop. Please contact an administrator.
description.dependencies: This template has derivatives and cannot be converted to a desktop. Please contact an administrator.
description.error: There was an error checking the dependencies of this template. Please try again later or contact an administrator if the problem persists.

quota-exceeded-modal.title: Template creation quota exceeded
quota-exceeded-modal.description: Template creation quota exceeded. A template must be deleted in order to create a new one.

password.label: Password
password.help: WARNING: The password will be stored unencrypted in the database.

fullscreen.label: Enable fullscreen by default
fullscreen.description: If enabled, the viewer will start in fullscreen mode.

bastion.label: Bastion enabled
bastion.description: Enable access to the desktop via a bastion host.

http-https.label: HTTP / HTTPS
http-https.description: Access the desktop using a web browser or an RDP viewer that supports HTTP/HTTPS connections.

alert.title: You can use your own domain name to access this desktop via bastion.
alert.description: Add a CNAME record to your DNS provider pointing to: {cname-url}

ssh.label: SSH
ssh.description: Use an SSH client to connect to the desktop via the bastion host.

authorized-keys.label: Authorized SSH Keys (one per line)
authorized-keys.others-label: Other people's SSH keys (one per line)

own-key.managed: Your own key is added automatically from your profile when you start this desktop. This box is only for other people's public keys.
own-key.missing: You don't have a bastion SSH key in your profile yet, so you won't get SSH access automatically.

wireguard-warning.title: Wireguard interface required
wireguard-warning.description: The selected viewer needs the wireguard network interface to work. Add it to continue.
wireguard-warning.no-permission-description: The selected viewer needs the wireguard network interface to work, but you do not have permission to use it. Contact your administrator to enable it.

memory.label: Memory (GB)
memory.placeholder: Enter amount of memory in GB

modal.title: Configure Networks
modal.description: Add, delete or reorder the networks assigned to this domain
modal.empty-selected: Drag networks here or click + to add

warning.title: Restrictions applied
warning.subtitle: This value has been limited due to user permissions.

validation.min-length: The field {field} must be at least {min} characters long
validation.min-array-length: The field {field} must have at least {min} items
validation.max-array-length: The field {field} must have at most {max} items
validation.max-length: The field {field} must be at most {max} characters long
validation.min-value: The field {field} must be at least {min}
validation.max-value: The field {field} must be at most {max}

type.string: The field {field} must be a string
type.number: The field {field} must be a number
type.integer: The field {field} must be an integer
type.boolean: The field {field} must be true or false
type.array: The field {field} must be an array
type.email: The field {field} must be a valid email address

validation.invalid-format: The field {field} has an invalid format
validation.multiple-of: The field {field} must match at least one of the allowed formats
validation.invalid-union: The field {field} must match at least one of the allowed formats
validation.invalid-key: The field {field} has an invalid key
validation.invalid-element: The field {field} has an invalid element
validation.invalid-value: The field {field} has an invalid value

description.renew: The session is about to expire. It can be renewed to continue working without interruption.
description.max-renew-time: The session has expired and cannot be renewed anymore. Please log in again.
description.max-time: The session has expired and has reached its maximum renewals. Please log in again.
description.error-renew: There was an error renewing the session. Please log in again.

messages.desktop-time-limit: The '{name}' desktop will be stopped at {date}.
messages.searching-resources: We are looking for resources for the desktop. It will be started in a few minutes, please wait.

recycle-bin.title: Send item to recycle bin (its storage will still be considered in the user quota until permanently removed).
recycle-bin.subtitle: The items in the recycle bin will be permanently deleted after: {hours} hours.
recycle-bin.infinite-subtitle: Items in the recycle bin are not automatically deleted.

permanent.title: This action cannot be undone and all its associated data will be lost.

desktop.description-prefix: This are the details of the desktop

template.description-prefix: This are the details of the template

desktop-networks-modal.title: Networks — {name}
desktop-networks-modal.description: Network interfaces attached to this desktop. The Wireguard interface is shown first when present and exposes the routable guest IP.
desktop-networks-modal.empty: No networks attached to this desktop

stop-all-desktops-confirmation-modal.title: Stop all desktops
stop-all-desktops-confirmation-modal.description: This action will stop all your running desktops. Are you sure you want to proceed?

deployment-bastion-modal.title: Bastion — {name}
deployment-bastion-modal.description: Enable or disable bastion access for every desktop in this deployment. Running desktops are updated immediately; new and recreated desktops inherit this configuration when they first start.
deployment-bastion-modal.error-loading: Could not load the deployment bastion configuration
deployment-bastion-modal.error-saving: Could not save the deployment bastion configuration

deployment-user-bastion-modal.title: Bastion access — {name}
deployment-user-bastion-modal.description: Select a desktop to see its bastion access details.
deployment-user-bastion-modal.error-loading: Could not load the user's desktops
deployment-user-bastion-modal.no-desktops: This user has no desktops in this deployment

bastion-info-modal.title: Bastion access — {name}
bastion-info-modal.description: Connect to this desktop from outside your network through the bastion. Copy the URL or SSH command, or set a custom domain and authorized SSH keys below.
bastion-info-modal.no-bastion-configured: Bastion is not enabled for this desktop
bastion-info-modal.no-bastion-configured-description: Edit the desktop and enable HTTP/HTTPS or SSH access to use the bastion.

alert.title: You can use your own domain name to access this desktop via bastion.
alert.description: Add a CNAME record to your DNS provider pointing to: {cname-url}

recreate-desktop-confirmation-modal.title: Recreate desktop '{name}'
recreate-desktop-confirmation-modal.description:
Recreating the desktop will delete will delete all changes you made to it and restore it to its original template state.
This action cannot be undone.

change-image-modal.title: Change desktop image
change-image-modal.description: Choose an image for the desktop card preview.

errors.title: Error changing image
errors.generic: There was an error changing the image. Please try again.

change-image-modal.hint: Pick an existing image or upload a new one (PNG, JPG or GIF, max 5 MB).

upload-errors.title: Error uploading image
upload-errors.invalid_type: Invalid file type. Choose a PNG, JPG or GIF.
upload-errors.too_large: File is too large. Max size is 5 MB.

empty.title: No {kind} available
empty.description: Your {kind} will appear here once they are created or assigned to you.

not-enough-advanced-time-modal.title: Not enough advanced time
not-enough-advanced-time-modal.description: You need to book this desktop in advance to use it. Please go to the booking page to schedule your session.

desktop-start-now-modal.title: Start
desktop-start-now-modal.description: Select until when the desktop will be used.

select.label: End time
select.placeholder: Select until when it will be used

desktop-gpu-unavailable-modal.title: GPU '{current-gpu}' is not available for desktop '{name}' at the moment.
desktop-gpu-unavailable-modal.description: You can either book the desktop for later with its current GPU, or change the GPU now and start the desktop immediately.

change-and-start.title: Change and start
change-and-start.subtitle: It can be changed to an available graphic card model now and start it (It could affect the desktop performance)

book.title: Book the desktop
book.subtitle: Book the desktop with its current graphic card model checking its planification

desktop-gpu-change-and-start-modal.title: Change and Start
desktop-gpu-change-and-start-modal.description: Change the desktop GPU and start it immediately.

empty.title: No profiles available
empty.description: There are no other GPU profiles currently available.

notification-bar.needs-booking: This desktop needs booking to be started
notification-bar.shutdown: Desktop will shut down on {date} at {time}

desktop-storage-modal.title: Storage — {name}
desktop-storage-modal.description: Storage disks attached to this desktop. Actions are available while the desktop is stopped.
desktop-storage-modal.no-storages: This desktop has no storage attached.

actions.cancel-tooltip: Cancel the storage task currently running on this disk.
actions.increase-needs-stopped: The desktop must be stopped to increase the disk size.
actions.increase-needs-ready: The disk must be ready to be resized.
actions.no-actions: No actions available for this storage.

cancel-modal.title: Cancel storage operation?
cancel-modal.description: Cancel the running storage task on {name}? Partial files may be cleaned up after the task is aborted.
cancel-modal.fallback-error: Could not cancel the storage operation.

increase-modal.title: Increase disk size
increase-modal.description: Add capacity to the desktop's disk. The increment is applied to the virtual size and cannot be undone.
increase-modal.help: The disk grows by the specified amount of gigabytes. Quotas are enforced server-side.
increase-modal.fallback-error: Could not increase the disk size.

quota-exceeded-modal.title: Desktop creation quota exceeded
quota-exceeded-modal.description: Desktop creation quota exceeded. A desktop must be deleted in order to create a new one.

start-quota-exceeded-modal.title: Desktop start quota exceeded
start-quota-exceeded-modal.description: You have reached the maximum number of running desktops. A desktop must be stopped in order to start a new one.

storage-unavailable-modal.title: Storage unavailable
storage-unavailable-modal.description: The creation storage is currently unavailable and desktops cannot be created. Please try again later.

start-storage-unavailable-modal.title: System resources unavailable
start-storage-unavailable-modal.description: The system resources are currently unavailable and desktops cannot be started. Please try again later.

disable-confirmation.title: Disable direct access link?
disable-confirmation.description: The current link will stop working. If you enable direct access again in the future, a new link will be generated and the previous one will no longer be valid.

browser-viewers.label: Browser Viewers
browser-viewers.info: These viewers allow you to connect directly from your web browser. No additional software is needed.

file-viewers.label: File Viewers
file-viewers.info: These viewers require you to download a file to connect to the desktop. Specific software is needed to use them.

change-viewer-modal.title: Change viewer
change-viewer-modal.subtitle: You can view this desktop from your browser or using a remote desktop client.

browser-rdp.0: Works in any modern web browser

file-rdpvpn.3: Requires VPN access with WireGuard client

errors.duplicated_name: A media with this name already exists. Please choose a different name.

quota-exceeded-modal.title: Media creation quota exceeded
quota-exceeded-modal.description: Media creation quota exceeded. A media must be deleted in order to upload a new one.

preview.title: Preview
preview.subtitle: This is how the deployment will look like to the users. Edit it to make it easier to identify.

info.title: Deployment information
info.subtitle: Edit the deployment name and description.

visibility.title: Deployment visibility
visibility.subtitle: Edit the different visibility options for this deployment

alloweds.title: Allowed Groups and Users
alloweds.subtitle: This deployment will be shared with {groups} and {users}.

create-owner-desktop.label: Create a desktop for the deployment owner
create-owner-desktop.description: If enabled, a desktop will be automatically created for the deployment owner.

user-permissions.title: User permissions
user-permissions.subtitle: Edit the permissions for users in this deployment. These permissions will be applied to all desktops in the deployment and cannot be edited in individual desktops.

recreate.label: Allow users to recreate desktops in the deployment
recreate.description: If enabled, users will be able to restore their desktop to its original template state.

preview.title: Preview
preview.subtitle: This is how the desktop will look like. Edit its name and description to make it easier to identify.

hardware.title: Hardware
hardware.subtitle: Here you can edit the hardware and access configuration that will be used for the desktop.

form-delete-desktop-modal.title: Delete desktop '{desktop-name}' from deployment
form-delete-desktop-modal.description: This action will delete the desktop '{desktop-name}' from the deployment. The desktop will be deleted and all its associated data will be lost. This action cannot be undone.

add.title: Add a desktop to the deployment
add.description: Select a template to create a new desktop and add it to the deployment.

replace.title: Change template for desktop '{desktop-name}'
replace.description: This action will change the template of the desktop '{desktop-name}' to the new selected template.

alert.title: Warning
alert.description: Changing the template of a desktop will delete all changes you made to it and restore it to the new template state. This action cannot be undone.

form-update-hardware-modal.title: Edit hardware and access configuration for desktop '{desktop-name}'
form-update-hardware-modal.description: This is the hardware and access configuration that will be used for the desktop '{desktop-name}'. Edit it to fit your needs.

quota-exceeded-modal.title: Deployment creation quota exceeded
quota-exceeded-modal.description: Deployment creation quota exceeded. A deployment must be deleted in order to create a new one.

keep-urls.title: Keep URLs
keep-urls.description: Keep the links and download the CSV file.

regenerate-urls.title: Regenerate URLs
regenerate-urls.description: Reset the deployment links and download the CSV file (previously generated links will no longer be available).

errors.forbid: You need more advance time in order to create the booking
errors.maximum-time: You can't create a reservation for that long
errors.end-before-start: The booking end time can't be before the start time
errors.minimum-time: The booking must last at least 5 minutes
errors.past-booking: Can't create a booking in the past

errors.missing_category: A category needs to be selected
errors.rate_limit_date: Too many login attempts, please try again at {time}
errors.rate_limit: Too many login attempts, please try again later

errors.unauthorized: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
errors.not_found: The requested resource was not found.
errors.internal_server: An internal server error occurred. Please try again later.
errors.email_already_in_use: This email address is already in use

errors.token_expired: The token you provided has expired
errors.invalid_token: The token you provided is invalid
errors.no_active_migration: There is no active migration for your account.
errors.no_items_to_migrate: There are no items to migrate
errors.multiple_migrations_found_target_user: There are multiple migrations for the new user
errors.same_user_migration: You can't migrate to the same account. When obtaining the token, you must log out and log in with the new account
errors.different_category_migration: You can't migrate to an account from a different category
errors.role_migration_admin: You can't migrate from an admin account
errors.role_migration_user: You can't migrate to a user account from an account with a higher role
errors.migration_desktop_quota_error: The user has more desktops than the new user quota
errors.migration_template_quota_error: The user has more templates than the new user quota
errors.migration_media_quota_error: The user has more media than the new user quota
errors.migration_deployments_quota_error: The user has more deployments than the new user quota

errors.forbidden: The email domain you are trying to use is not authorized for your category.

generic.title: Error creating desktop
generic.description: There was an error while creating your desktop, please try again.

internal_server.title: Internal server error
internal_server.description: There was an internal server error while creating your desktop, please try again.

new_desktop_name_exists.title: Desktop name already exists
new_desktop_name_exists.description: A desktop with the same name already exists. Please choose a different name.

desktop_new_user_quota_exceeded.title: User quota exceeded
desktop_new_user_quota_exceeded.description: You've exceeded your desktop creation quota. You must delete a desktop in order to create a new one.

no_storage_pool_available.title: No storage pool available
no_storage_pool_available.description: There is no storage pool available to create the desktop. Please contact an administrator or try again later.

temporal_new_reservable.title: Temporal desktops cannot have reservables
temporal_new_reservable.description: Temporal desktops cannot have reservables assigned. Please remove the reservables and try again.

errors.new_template_name_exists: A template with this name already exists. Please choose a different name.
errors.generic: There was an error creating the template, please try again.
errors.storage_pending_task: This desktop's disk is busy with another operation. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.template_failed: This template failed and can't be duplicated.

generic.title: Error creating media
generic.description: There was an error while creating your media, please try again.

duplicated_name.title: Media name already exists
duplicated_name.description: A media with this name already exists. Please choose a different name.

quota_exceeded.title: Quota exceeded
quota_exceeded.description: You've exceeded your media creation quota. You must delete a media in order to create a new one.

media_url_not_valid.title: Invalid media URL
media_url_not_valid.description: The provided media URL is not valid. Please check the URL and try again.

media_url_bad_format.title: Invalid media URL format
media_url_bad_format.description: The provided media URL does not meet the requirements.

generic.title: Error creating deployment
generic.description: There was an error while creating your deployment, please try again.

new_desktop_name_exists.title: One or more users have a desktop with this name
new_desktop_name_exists.description: The following users already have a desktop with the name {desktop_name}. Please choose a different name.

duplicated_name.title: Deployment name already exists
duplicated_name.description: A deployment with the name {deployment_name} already exists. Please choose a different name.

deployment_reservables_not_equal.title: Desktop reservables are not equal
deployment_reservables_not_equal.description: All desktops with reservables in a deployment must have the same reservables assigned. Please make sure all desktops with reservables have the same reservables assigned and try again.

errors.generic: There was an error saving the desktop. Please try again.
errors.internal_server: Internal server error while saving the desktop.
errors.desktop_not_stopped: The desktop must be stopped before editing.

errors.generic: There was an error saving the template. Please try again.
errors.internal_server: Internal server error while saving the template.
errors.new_template_name_exists: A template with this name already exists.

errors.conflict: The booking does not fit in requested date
errors.booking_does_not_fit_date: The booking does not fit in requested date
errors.booking_max_items_exceeded: You've exceeded the user maximum bookings
errors.booking_desktop_delete_stop: The desktop must be stopped to delete this booking
errors.booking_deployment_delete_stop: The deployment must be stopped to delete this booking

errors.conflict: The plan overlaps with an existing plan
errors.reservable_item_not_found: The reservable item was not found
errors.no_available_profile: No available profile for this item

browser-vnc.title: VNC Browser
browser-vnc.description: Connect to the desktop using the VNC protocol directly in your browser. No client software required.

browser-rdp.title: RDP Browser
browser-rdp.description: Connect to the desktop using the RDP protocol directly in your browser. No client software required.

file-rdpgw.title: RDP
file-rdpgw.description: Connect to the desktop using the RDP protocol via a gateway. Download and open the connection file with an RDP client.

file-rdpvpn.title: RDP VPN
file-rdpvpn.description: Connect to the desktop using the RDP protocol over a VPN. Download and open the connection file with an RDP client.

file-spice.title: SPICE
file-spice.description: Connect to the desktop using the SPICE protocol, optimized for virtual machines. Download and open the connection file with a SPICE client.
